SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Signed and stamped offer is requested, but package structure is unclear.
Recommended Action: Ask buyer to confirm file format and required annex list.

SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Delivery deadline exists, but milestone acceptance is undefined.
Recommended Action: Clarify delivery milestones, dependencies and acceptance owner.

SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Support is requested, but severity, response and restore targets are missing.
Recommended Action: Request SLA table and warranty support boundary.

SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Centralized management is required, but reporting scope is vague.
Recommended Action: Clarify reporting, audit, inventory and role-based access needs.

SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Wording references vendor-style architecture and may create lock-in risk.
Recommended Action: Request acceptance of functionally equivalent solutions.

SpecBridge AI Sample Finding: Final test and sign-off procedure are not defined.
Recommended Action: Define acceptance test checklist before final bid.
